turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 89-1555 Dennis versus Higgins will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON WHITE
turns.text: This case is here from the Supreme Court of Nebraska and for the reasons stated in an opinion on file with the clerk the judgment of the Supreme Court of Nebraska is reversed. Justice Kennedy has filed a dissenting opinion and he is joined by the Chief Justice.
